modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Adobe account repeatedly prompts for sign-in access

full_description_text:  
The user is trying to access Adobe Creative Cloud. They keep getting asked to sign in. This happens on both macOS and Windows. The user cannot get into their account at all. It is very frustrating for them. They just want to use Adobe Acrobat but cannot because of this sign-in issue.
short_description: Adobe account repeatedly prompts for sign-in access
description: The user is trying to access Adobe Creative Cloud. They keep getting asked to sign in. This happens on both macOS and Windows. The user cannot get into their account at all. It is very frustrating for them. They just want to use Adobe Acrobat but cannot because of this sign-in issue.
